prompts.text: The photo in your camera roll that would END you if it leaked
Your most unhinged screenshot. We WILL be judging.
A photo you forgot you took and honestly wish you hadn't remembered
The worst photo of yourself on your phone. Dig deep. We want SUFFERING.
A photo that needs SO much context it's not even funny
The last photo you took before today. No cheating. We'll KNOW.
A food photo that has absolutely no business looking like that
The most NPC photo on your phone. Zero aura. Maximum basic.
A photo where your aura is absolutely immaculate
A photo you should have deleted MONTHS ago but here we are
The hardest photo of an animal on your phone. Peak creature.
A photo from somewhere you had NO business being
A photo that tells a whole story and none of it is good
Your most zoomed-in photo. We need to know what you were investigating.
A photo with a random stranger in it being an absolute legend
A photo that goes SO hard it could be an album cover
The most chaotic photo on your phone. Pure brain rot energy.
A blurry photo that still ate. Motion blur is an art form.
A screenshot that proves you are chronically online
A photo you took at 3 AM that seemed like a GREAT idea
A text conversation screenshot that has no right being that funny
The photo on your phone with the strongest cursed energy
Take a selfie that looks like a mugshot. You know your angles.
Photograph something within arm's reach and make it look like it costs a million dollars
Take the most dramatic photo of your hand. Cinema.
Take a photo of the floor and make it go HARD
Take a photo that looks like it's from a horror movie. Jump scare energy.
Photograph someone in the room without them noticing. Stealth mission.
Take a photo of your shoe like it's a runway ad. Vogue type shi.
Take the most unflattering selfie possible. We want COOKED.
Photograph something in the room that nobody else will think of
Take a photo that looks like it costs $10,000. Fake rich energy.
Make someone in the room look like a final boss
Make the ceiling look like a work of art. We believe in you.
Take a photo with the energy of a Renaissance painting. Dramatic lighting required.
Photograph your most sigma angle. Let the aura speak.
Photograph your reflection in something unexpected
Take a photo that looks like it belongs on a missing poster
Make a random object in this room look like a legendary weapon
Take a photo that looks like someone's cooking is absolutely BUSSIN
A photo that tells a love story. Tragic or beautiful. Dealer's choice.
A photo that would make an ELITE meme template
A photo that looks like evidence. For what? That's YOUR problem.
A photo a museum would hang on the wall and people would stand in front of for 20 minutes
A photo that looks like a movie scene that just goes HARD
A photo that would absolutely go viral. Algorithm bait.
A photo that captures pure, unfiltered chaos. No thoughts. Only vibes.
A photo that would make a hard book cover. Bestseller energy.
The most aesthetic photo on your phone. We want AURA.
A photo that hits you right in the feels. Emotional damage welcome.
A photo that radiates main character energy. Protagonist behavior.
A photo taken by accident that goes harder than anything you've ever done on purpose
A photo with more aura than a final boss entrance
A photo that would get you INSTANTLY banned from a group chat
A photo that is simultaneously cursed AND blessed. Blursed.
Your fridge. Right now. We're JUDGING.
The last thing you ate. Masterpiece or disaster, show us.
Your screen time report. Expose yourself.
What's under your bed right now. No cleaning first.
The saddest thing within arm's reach
The view from your window. Main character or side quest?
Your most prized possession. Guard it with your LIFE.
The inside of your bag or pocket. We're doing an inventory check.
Your phone wallpaper. Instant aura check.
Something you own that NOBODY else in this game owns
Your gaming setup OR your workspace. Let the people judge.
Your snack collection. Don't hold back.
The current state of your desk or table. Unedited. Raw.
A photo that screams Monday at maximum volume
What 3 AM feels like
The visual equivalent of a deep, heavy sigh
What your last brain cell looks like. It's working overtime.
A photo that SMELLS bad. You know the vibe.

A photo that radiates divorced energy
The visual equivalent of being absolutely COOKED

What the group chat sounds like as a photo
The visual equivalent of lobby music
A photo that hits different at 2 AM
What 'I'll do it tomorrow' looks like. We all know.
The opposite of a vacation photo. Anti-paradise.
Peak brain rot energy in one single photo
What delulu energy looks like. Full confidence. Zero reason.
A photo that looks like a loading screen for real life
What GG feels like as a photo
A photo that feels like a respawn point
A photo that would make your mom CALL you
The most suspicious photo you can take in 90 seconds
A photo that looks like a cry for help but is actually fine

A photo that raises more questions than it answers

The photo that would play at your trial
A photo that makes people say 'are you okay' and the answer is no
Take a photo that looks like the last thing someone sees before a boss fight
A photo that would get you put on a watchlist (affectionate)
Something that should NOT be photographed but here we are
A photo that feels like a threat but you can't explain why
